market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: £285 Home with Garden Access + Modern Skylights
Chic Modern Home | Garden Access | 4 Guests
analysis.rewritten_desc: This stunning entire home offers 4 guests a luxurious base in central [Location], featuring skylights that flood the space with natural light and bifold doors leading to a private garden. While our listing remains under construction, we’re excited to offer 60 open nights over the next 90 days at £285/night. Despite our rate being 63% above the local median (£175), your stay will include access to [Location]’s top attractions within walking distance. Ideal for those seeking modern luxury with direct garden access, we’re committed to creating a memorable stay.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Lead with the garden view through bifold doors if available, as outdoor space is high-value in listings and missing from current descriptions
key_diagnosis: Title lacks location/occupancy signal: 50-char limit allows better visibility for [Location] in title
Description missing entirely: 0/10 rating due to complete absence of written content when 74% of competitors have descriptions
No amenities listed in 4.92-star listing: Missing 3 high-value categories (Outdoor, Parking, Entertainment) that drive bookings in this market
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £285 rate is 63% above the local median but 4.92-star rating and 33.7% booking rate suggest strong potential to fill 60 open nights
